name: assessing-external-test-risk
tagline: Assesses whether a branch/PR diff is high-risk for externally hosted or embedded Streamlit use and recommends external e2e test coverage.
verdict: Clean, deterministic, read-only risk-assessment skill with an explicit any-hit decision rule, an 11-category checklist, a structured output contract, and two worked examples. No security concerns. Only real gap: no negative-trigger/out-of-scope guidance, and no version/changelog signal.

highlights.summary: No NOT-for/exclusion guidance despite adjacent PR-review/test-planning skills that could overlap.
No version field or changelog anywhere in the skill.
